nodes.text: He considers the question, briefly, the way a person considers whether they have left the stove on.
"I don't take temperature the way you do. Mine's set, and I haven't had the time yet to learn how to feel weather. I'll get there. Everyone does. It's the second-hardest thing about coming through."
You do not ask what the hardest is. He looks like a person who would, if asked, tell you, and you do not want him to.
